# Data Sharing Code of Practice

Jurisdiction: United Kingdom
Region: UK
Citation: Data sharing: a code of practice
Authority: UK Information Commissioner's Office
Source URL: https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/uk-gdpr-guidance-and-resources/data-sharing/data-sharing-a-code-of-practice/
Topics: third_party_sharing, processor_contracts, notice_transparency, accountability
Keywords: data sharing code, DPIA, data sharing agreement, controller sharing

## Summary
ICO statutory code explaining lawful, fair, and accountable data sharing under UK data protection law.

## Key compliance obligations
- Assess lawful basis and fairness before sharing.
- Use data-sharing agreements where appropriate.
- Document accountability and transparency decisions.
